summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, people-loving (97% extrovert!) People Program Manager who thrives on solving problems through data analysis, developing programs grounded in evidence, and collaborating with stakeholders for sustainable impact. Expect me to always be seeking ways we can improve belonging and people experience—through human-centered, data-driven approaches.

bullets.text: Develop annual plans and execute end-to-end {coord|program logistics} for 20+ initiatives, including {coord|summits, events,} and live sessions
Facilitate listening sessions with 25 global {cross|stakeholders}, translating needs into 3 new programs and a 78% program enrollment rate
Coach and mentor program leaders across {cross|Marketing, Tech, and Sales} teams, refining communication strategy via feedback analysis
Establish {data|metrics} and documentation for 70+ staff to measure effectiveness and benchmark program impact
Upskill the client team in {data|data analytics} to audit 300+ cases, successfully refuting cost assumptions via evidence-based insights
Empower stakeholders to present executive-ready insights on $362K in costs, leading to policy redesigns and training
Provided consultations and internal training on {ex|DEI}, Inclusive Leadership, and performance review across the organization
Analyzed 2,000+ employee responses, reporting insights and recommending actions to the C-suite on {ex|belonging} and engagement
Led a manager effectiveness initiative, transforming {data|feedback data} into actionable reports that informed engagement strategies
Improved {ex|employee experience} via 5 {cross|cross-functional} projects focusing on survey development, rewards & recognition, and L&D
Piloted a {ex|DEI} Inclusive Leadership workshop for 12 senior leaders, later scaled to 23 global locations
Strengthened engagement via an HR newsletter and award-winning well-being initiatives, recognized among 1,000+ competitors
Optimized onboarding processes across 3 global locations by conducting process analysis and clarifying responsibilities
Directed a Merger & Acquisition project, migrating and merging employee records across systems
Developed proficiency across various HR functions, ranging from recruitment and compensation to performance management
Filled a challenging international role by drafting job descriptions, posting openings, and researching global compensation details
Engaged global talent via personalized communication and customer service, increasing applications by 566% in 2 months
Organized recruiting events and moderated panels with C-suite at top 3 universities, reaching 230+ students and 80+ applicants

InGenius → Set B/H: annual plans + program logistics + summits/events (direct JD: ERG summits, Heritage Months), listening sessions + 78%, coach/mentor program leaders (JD: coach guild leaders), metrics + benchmarking. Reordered to lead with events/logistics. ODN → Pair A (quantified). NextGen → led with DEI/Inclusive Leadership consultations + belonging framing (strongest match). Vestas → led with DEI Inclusive Leadership workshop. Skills → kept HRCI. NOTE: JD wants 5-6 yrs events + people ops + scaling at 5,000+ orgs; Jamie ~3 yrs — seniority/scale stretch, but DEI/inclusion/events/coaching/metrics overlap is genuinely strong.
